2606.16995.title: When in Doubt, Plan It Out: Committed Small Language Model Deliberation for Reactive Reinforcement Learning
2606.16995.paper_summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) policies often degrade in unfamiliar environments because they lack explicit deliberation. We propose Plan, Align, Commit, Think (PACT), a hybrid architecture that combines a fast, reactive RL policy with a slow, deliberative Small Language Model (SLM) planner. PACT invokes the SLM asynchronously to generate and validate candidate action plans. Once a plan is verified through simulation as safe, feasible, and complete, it is executed directly, bypassing the RL policy without retraining or modifying it. Evaluated on three FrozenLake configurations of increasing difficulty, PACT outperforms all baselines while relying on a 2B-parameter SLM backbone, suggesting that deliberative planning and reactive execution are more powerful in concert than either is alone in these settings.
2606.16995.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）策略在不熟悉的環境中常常會退化，因為它們缺乏明確的深思熟慮。我們提出了計劃、對齊、承諾、思考（PACT），這是一種混合架構，將快速的反應性RL策略與緩慢的深思熟慮的小型語言模型（SLM）規劃器結合在一起。PACT異步調用SLM來生成和驗證候選行動計劃。一旦計劃通過模擬驗證為安全、可行和完整，它將直接執行，繞過RL策略而不需要重新訓練或修改它。在三個難度逐漸增加的FrozenLake配置上進行評估，PACT的表現超過了所有基準，並依賴於一個具有20億參數的SLM骨幹，這表明在這些設置中，深思熟慮的規劃和反應性執行的結合比單獨使用任何一者更強大。
2606.16995.author: Nathan Gavenski et.al.
2606.16995.authors: Nathan Gavenski, Juarez Monteiro, Francisco Galuppo, Adriano Veloso, Odinaldo Rodrigues
